name: Strength
description: Physical power for melee attacks, carrying capacity, and Strength-based skills.

name: Dexterity
description: Agility, reflexes, and balance, used for ranged attacks, AC, Initiative, and Dexterity-based skills.

name: Constitution
description: Health and stamina, governing Hit Points and concentration on spells.

name: Intelligence
description: Mental acuity and memory, used for spellcasting by some classes and Intelligence-based skills.

name: Wisdom
description: Perceptiveness and insight, used for spellcasting by some classes and Wisdom-based skills.

name: Charisma
description: Force of personality and social grace, used for spellcasting by some classes and Charisma-based skills.
